creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Created attachment 220010
net-mgmt/prometheus2: Update to 2.23.0

This patch updates net-mgmt/prometheus2 to v2.23.0. The update contains some potentially breaking changes to remote write metric names.

A full changelog can be found at https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/releases/tag/v2.23.0

-David
